      <!DOCTYPE html>
      <html>
      <head>
      <meta charset="UTF-8">
      <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
      <title>幸运转盘 - 免费抽奖</title>
      <style>
      * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
      html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
      body { font-family: 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); min-height: 100vh; display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center; padding: 20px; }
      .container { background: white; padding: 40px; border-radius: 20px; width: 98%; max-width: 1400px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); }
      h1 { text-align: center; margin-bottom: 40px; font-size: 42px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text; }
      .main-layout { display: flex; gap: 40px; justify-content: center; align-items: flex-start; flex-wrap: wrap; }
      .left-section { flex: 0 0 280px; }
      .rule-box { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f5f5 0%, #fafafa 100%); padding: 25px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 5px solid #667eea; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); }
      .rule-box h3 { margin-bottom: 20px; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; color: #333; }
      .rule-box p { margin: 8px 0; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; color: #666; }
      .center-section { flex: 0 0 auto; text-align: center; position: relative; }
      .wheel-wrapper { position: relative; width: 540px; height: 540px; margin: 0 auto 30px; }
      .wheel { width: 500px; height: 500px; border: 15px solid #ff9800; border-radius: 50%; margin: 20px auto; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 120px; transition: transform 3s cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); background: linear-gradient(135deg, #fff8e1 0%, #ffe0b2 100%); position: relative; box-shadow: 0 15px 40px rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.4), inset 0 2px 5px rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.8); }
      .wheel.spinning { filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(255, 152, 0, 0.8)); }
      .pointer { position: absolute; top: -35px; font-size: 50px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 10; filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2)); }
      #result { text-align: center; font-size: 18px; font-weight: bold; min-height: 30px; color: #333; margin-top: 20px; }
      .right-section { flex: 0 0 280px; }
      .info-box { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f0f0 0%, #fafafa 100%); padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05); }
      .info-item { margin: 10px 0; }
      .info-label { font-size: 12px; color: #999; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.5px; }
      .info-value { display: block; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; color: #ff9800; margin-top: 5px; }
      input { padding: 12px; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 14px; border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; border-radius: 8px; width: 100%; transition: all 0.3s; }
      input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #667eea; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.2); }
      button { padding: 12px 20px; margin: 8px 0; font-size: 14px; font-weight: bold; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s; width: 100%; }
      .btn-primary { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.3); }
      .btn-primary:hover:not(:disabled) { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(102, 126, 234, 0.5); }
      .btn-primary:active:not(:disabled) { transform: translateY(-1px); }
      .btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; }
      .btn-secondary { background: #f0f0f0; color: #333; border: 2px solid #e0e0e0; }
      .btn-secondary:hover { background: #e8e8e8; border-color: #d0d0d0; }
      .modal { display: none; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6); z-index: 1000; align-items: center; justify-content: center; backdrop-filter: blur(4px); }
      .modal.active { display: flex; animation: fadeIn 0.3s; }
      @keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
      .modal-content { background: white; padding: 40px; border-radius: 20px; box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3); width: 90%; max-width: 450px; animation: slideUp 0.3s; }
      @keyframes slideUp { from { transform: translateY(50px); opacity: 0; } to { transform: translateY(0); opacity: 1; } }
      .modal-content h3 { margin-bottom: 25px; font-size: 22px; color: #333; text-align: center; }
      .modal-content input { width: 100%; margin-bottom: 15px; }
      .modal-buttons { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 10px; margin-top: 25px; }
      .reward-modal { z-index: 2000; }
      .reward-content { background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); color: white; text-align: center; padding: 50px 40px; }
      .reward-icon { font-size: 100px; margin: 20px 0; animation: bounce 0.6s infinite; display: block; }
      @keyframes bounce { 0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } 50% { transform: translateY(-30px) scale(1.1); } }
      .reward-name { font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; margin: 20px 0; letter-spacing: 1px; }
      .rarity-badge { display: inline-block; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 25px; font-size: 13px; font-weight: bold; margin: 15px 0; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); }
      .rarity-legendary { background: rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.9); color: #333; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255, 215, 0, 0.4); }
      .rarity-epic { background: rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.9); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(255, 107, 157, 0.4); }
      .rarity-rare { background: rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.9); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(157, 78, 221, 0.4); }
      .rarity-common { background: rgba(58, 134, 255, 0.9); color: white; box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(58, 134, 255, 0.4); }
      .rarity-none { background: rgba(153, 153, 153, 0.9); color: white; }
      .reward-value { font-size: 26px; margin: 15px 0; font-weight: 600; }
      .reward-modal .btn-secondary { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.2); color: white; border: 2px solid white; margin-top: 30px; }
      .reward-modal .btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); }
      @media (max-width: 1200px) { .main-layout { flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } .wheel-wrapper { width: 400px; height: 400px; } .wheel { width: 380px; height: 380px; font-size: 80px; } .pointer { font-size: 40px; top: -25px; } .left-section, .center-section, .right-section { flex: 1; width: 100%; max-width: 400px; } }
      @media (max-width: 600px) { .container { padding: 20px; } h1 { font-size: 28px; margin-bottom: 25px; } .wheel-wrapper { width: 300px; height: 300px; } .wheel { width: 280px; height: 280px; font-size: 60px; border: 10px solid #ff9800; } .pointer { font-size: 30px; top: -20px; } .reward-icon { font-size: 70px; } .reward-name { font-size: 24px; } }
      </style>
      </head>
      <body>
      <div class="container">
      <h1>🎉 幸运转盘</h1>
      <div class="main-layout">
      <div class="left-section">
      <div class="rule-box">
      <h3>📜 游戏说明</h3>
      <p>🎁 <strong>免费注册</strong></p>
      <p>送 100,000 积分</p>
      <p style="margin-top: 15px;">🎯 <strong>30,000 积分</strong></p>
      <p>= 1 次抽奖</p>
      <p style="margin-top: 15px;">🏆 <strong>奖项设置</strong></p>
      <p>🌟 iPhone 手机（5%）</p>
      <p>🎧 AirPods 耳机（5%）</p>
      <p>💰 高额现金（15%）</p>
      <p>⭐ 积分大奖（30%）</p>
      <p>🎫 小额积分（40%）</p>
      <p style="margin-top: 15px;">💱 <strong>积分兑换</strong></p>
      <p>100 积分 = 1 越南盾</p>
      <p style="margin-top: 15px;">💸 <strong>提现要求</strong></p>
      <p>满 100 万盾可提现</p>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div class="center-section">
      <div class="wheel-wrapper">
      <div class="pointer">🔻</div>
      <div id="wheel" class="wheel">🎁</div>
      </div>
      <div id="result"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="right-section">
      <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
      <div class="info-box">
      <div class="info-label">MY POINTS</div>
      <div class="info-value" id="points">0</div>
      </div>
      <div class="info-box">
      <div class="info-label">MY CASH</div>
      <div class="info-value" id="cash">0</div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <input type="text" id="username" placeholder="输入用户名" maxlength="20">
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="showRegister()">注册新账户</button>
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="login()">登录</button>
      <button class="btn-primary" onclick="spin()" id="spinBtn" disabled>🎡 抽奖<br>(30,000 积分)</button>
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="showRechargeModal()">💰 充值积分</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div id="registerBox" class="modal">
      <div class="modal-content">
      <h3>🎉 注册新账户</h3>
      <input type="text" id="reg_username" placeholder="用户名（3-20字符）" maxlength="20">
      <input type="password" id="reg_password" placeholder="密码">
      <input type="tel" id="reg_phone" placeholder="手机号码">
      <input type="text" id="reg_bank" placeholder="银行卡号">
      <div class="modal-buttons">
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeRegister()">取消</button>
      <button class="btn-primary" onclick="submitRegister()">确认注册</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      <div id="rewardModal" class="modal reward-modal">
      <div class="modal-content reward-content">
      <div class="reward-icon" id="rewardIcon"></div>
      <div class="reward-name" id="rewardName"></div>
      <div class="rarity-badge" id="rarityBadge"></div>
      <div class="reward-value" id="rewardValue"></div>
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeRewardModal()">继续抽奖</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      <script>
      const API = "http://localhost:3000";
      let currentUser = null;
      let currentDeg = 0;
      let isSpinning = false;
      function playAudio(url, volume = 0.5) {
      try { const audio = new Audio(url); audio.volume = volume; audio.play().catch(() => {}); } catch (e) {}
      }
      function login() {
      const username = document.getElementById("username").value.trim();
      if (!username) { alert("❗ 请输入用户名"); return; }
      fetch(API + "/register", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
      body: JSON.stringify({ userId: username, password: "default", phone: "0", bank: "0" })
      })
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => {
      if (d.error) { alert("❌ " + d.error); }
      else {
      currentUser = username;
      updateUI(d);
      document.getElementById("username").value = "";
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = false;
      alert("✅ 登录成功！");
      }
      })
      .catch(e => { console.error(e); alert("❌ 网络连接失败"); });
      }
      function showRegister() { document.getElementById("registerBox").classList.add("active"); }
      function closeRegister() { document.getElementById("registerBox").classList.remove("active"); }
      function submitRegister() {
      const username = document.getElementById("reg_username").value.trim();
      const password = document.getElementById("reg_password").value.trim();
      const phone = document.getElementById("reg_phone").value.trim();
      const bank = document.getElementById("reg_bank").value.trim();
      if (!username || !password || !phone || !bank) { alert("❗ 请填写完整信息"); return; }
      if (username.length < 3) { alert("❗ 用户名至少3个字符"); return; }
      fetch(API + "/register", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
      body: JSON.stringify({userId: username, password, phone, bank})
      })
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => {
      if (d.error) { alert("❌ " + d.error); }
      else {
      currentUser = username;
      updateUI(d);
      closeRegister();
      document.getElementById("reg_username").value = "";
      document.getElementById("reg_password").value = "";
      document.getElementById("reg_phone").value = "";
      document.getElementById("reg_bank").value = "";
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = false;
      alert("✅ 注册成功！送你 100,000 积分");
      }
      })
      .catch(e => { console.error(e); alert("❌ 注册���败"); });
      }
      function updateUI(userData) {
      const points = userData.points || 0;
      const cash = userData.cash || 0;
      document.getElementById("points").innerText = points.toLocaleString();
      document.getElementById("cash").innerText = cash.toLocaleString();
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = points < 30000;
      }
      function spin() {
      if (!currentUser) { alert("❗ 请先登录"); return; }
      if (isSpinning) { alert("⏳ 转盘正在转动"); return; }
      isSpinning = true;
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = true;
      const wheel = document.getElementById("wheel");
      wheel.classList.add("spinning");
      playAudio("data:audio/wav;base64,UklGRiYAAABXQVZFZm10IBAAAAABAAEAQB8AAAB9AAACABAAZGF0YQIAAAAAAA==", 0.3);
      const extra = 3600 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 5400);
      currentDeg += extra;
      wheel.style.transform = "rotate(" + currentDeg + "deg)";
      setTimeout(() => {
      fetch(API + "/spin", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
      body: JSON.stringify({userId: currentUser})
      })
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => {
      wheel.classList.remove("spinning");
      if (d.error) {
      document.getElementById("result").innerText = "❌ " + d.error;
      isSpinning = false;
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = false;
      } else {
      updateUI(d.user);
      playAudio("data:audio/wav;base64,UklGRiYAAABXQVZFZm10IBAAAAABAAEAQB8AAAB9AAACABAAZGF0YQIAAAAAAA==", 0.5);
      showRewardModal(d.reward);
      isSpinning = false;
      document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = d.user.points < 30000;
      }
      })
      .catch(e => { console.error(e); alert("❌ 抽奖失败"); isSpinning = false; document.getElementById("spinBtn").disabled = false; });
      }, 3000);
      }
      function showRewardModal(reward) {
      const rarityTexts = {
      legendary: "🌟 传说级 - 超级大奖！",
      epic: "🔥 史诗级 - 高级奖品",
      rare: "💎 稀有级 - 优质奖品",
      common: "📦 普通级 - 奖品获得",
      none: "😢 未中奖 - 再试一次"
      };
      document.getElementById("rewardIcon").innerText = reward.icon;
      document.getElementById("rewardName").innerText = reward.name;
      document.getElementById("rarityBadge").innerText = rarityTexts[reward.rarity];
      document.getElementById("rarityBadge").className = "rarity-badge rarity-" + reward.rarity;
      let valueText = "";
      if (reward.type === "cash") { valueText = "获得 " + reward.value.toLocaleString() + " 越南盾"; }
      else if (reward.type === "points") { valueText = "获得 " + reward.value.toLocaleString() + " 积分"; }
      else if (reward.type === "iphone") { valueText = "恭喜！你赢得了 iPhone 15！"; }
      else if (reward.type === "airpods") { valueText = "恭喜！你赢得了 AirPods Pro！"; }
      else { valueText = "下次会更幸运哦 😊"; }
      document.getElementById("rewardValue").innerText = valueText;
      document.getElementById("rewardModal").classList.add("active");
      }
      function closeRewardModal() { document.getElementById("rewardModal").classList.remove("active"); }
      function recharge() { alert("💰 充值方式\n\n📱 MoMo 钱包\n🏦 越南银行\n💬 Zalo Pay\n\n📞 联系客服：+84 123 456 7890"); }
      document.getElementById("registerBox").addEventListener("click", (e) => { if (e.target.id === "registerBox") closeRegister(); });
      document.getElementById("rewardModal").addEventListener("click", (e) => { if (e.target.id === "rewardModal") closeRewardModal(); });
      <script>
      // 显示充值窗口
      function showRechargeModal() {
      document.getElementById("rechargeModal").classList.add("active");
      }
      // 关闭充值窗口
      function closeRechargeModal() {
      document.getElementById("rechargeModal").classList.remove("active");
      }
      // 提交充值申请
      function submitRecharge() {
      const amount = parseInt(document.getElementById("rechargeAmount").value);
      const method = document.getElementById("rechargeMethod").value;
      if (!amount || amount < 10000) {
      alert("❗ 最低充值 10,000 积分");
      return;
      }
      if (!method) {
      alert("❗ 请选择充值方式");
      return;
      }
      fetch(API + "/recharge/request", {
      method: "POST",
      headers: {"Content-Type": "application/json"},
      body: JSON.stringify({
      userId: currentUser,
      amount: amount,
      method: method
      })
      })
      .then(r => r.json())
      .then(d => {
      if (d.error) {
      alert("❌ " + d.error);
      } else {
      alert("✅ 充值申请已提交！\n\n请通过 " + (method === 'momo' ? 'MoMo' : method === 'bank' ? '银行' : 'Zalo') + " 转账 " + amount + " 积分\n\n等待客服确认后积分将自动到账");
      document.getElementById("rechargeAmount").value = "";
      document.getElementById("rechargeMethod").value = "";
      closeRechargeModal();
      }
      })
      .catch(e => {
      console.error(e);
      alert("❌ 提交失败");
      });
      }
      // 点击外部关闭窗口
      document.getElementById("rechargeModal").addEventListener("click", (e) => {
      if (e.target.id === "rechargeModal") closeRechargeModal();
      });
      </script>
      <!-- 充值模态框 -->
      <div id="rechargeModal" class="modal">
      <div class="modal-content">
      <h3>💰 充值积分</h3>
      <p style="color: #666; font-size: 13px;">最低充值：10,000 积分</p>
      <label style="display: block; margin: 15px 0;">
      <span style="font-weight: bold;">充值金额（积分）</span>
      <input type="number" id="rechargeAmount" placeholder="输入金额" min="10000" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin-top: 5px;">
      </label>
      <label style="display: block; margin: 15px 0;">
      <span style="font-weight: bold;">充值方式</span>
      <select id="rechargeMethod" style="width: 100%; padding: 10px; margin-top: 5px;">
      <option value="">-- 选择充值方式 --</option>
      <option value="momo">📱 MoMo 钱包</option>
      <option value="bank">🏦 越南银行转账</option>
      <option value="zalo">💬 Zalo Pay</option>
      </select>
      </label>
      <div style="background: #f0f0f0; padding: 15px; border-radius: 8px; margin: 15px 0; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.6;">
      <p><strong>充值步骤：</strong></p>
      <p>1️⃣ 填写金额和选择方式</p>
      <p>2️⃣ 点击"提交申请"</p>
      <p>3️⃣ 通过选定方式转账</p>
      <p>4️⃣ 等待客服确认（通常 5-10 分钟）</p>
      <p>5️⃣ 积分自动到账</p>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-buttons">
      <button class="btn-secondary" onclick="closeRechargeModal()">取消</button>
      <button class="btn-primary" onclick="submitRecharge()">提交申请</button>
      </div>
      </div>
      </div>
      </body>
      </html>

      Footer

      You can’t perform that action at this time.
